top_signals.title: CMA CGM Takes Delivery of World’s Largest LNG-Powered Container Ship
top_signals.summary: The CMA CGM Group has taken delivery of the CMA CGM Notre Dame, a new-generation LNG-powered vessel and the largest container ship currently operating under the French flag. The vessel has begun its maiden commercial voyage in Shanghai, China…
